zh.lifeSummary: 當Conrad Waggoner於1729年1月20日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯時，他的父親Joseph Wagner23歲，母親Anna Maria Vogelgesang21歲。他於大約1752年與Eva Margaretha Kale在美國賓夕法尼亞州結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1790年住在美國賓夕法尼亞州巴可斯且於1790年住在美國北卡羅來納州林肯。他去世於1799年12月15日在美國北卡羅來納州享年70歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州卡塔巴牛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conrad Waggoner于1729年1月20日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯时，他的父亲Joseph Wagner23岁，母亲Anna Maria Vogelgesang21岁。他于大约1752年与Eva Margaretha Kale在美国宾夕法尼亚州结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1790年住在美国宾夕法尼亚州巴可斯且于1790年住在美国北卡罗来纳州林肯。他去世于1799年12月15日在美国北卡罗来纳州享年70岁，埋葬在美国北卡罗来纳州卡塔巴牛頓。

nameMeanings.name: Waggoner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German or Dutch   Wagner   or its German and Dutch variants   Wagener   and   Wagenaar  . Compare   Waggener   and   Wagoner  .
Possibly also English: altered form of Waghorn . The surname Waggoner is very rare in Britain.

History: A planter named John Waggener or Waggoner, who came to America c. 1670 and lived in Essex County, VA, is said to have been born in Colchester, Essex (England). No documentary source for this origin is given and an English origin is difficult to establish. The nearest similar English surname is Wagner 2, a very rare Norfolk name, originating in the 14th-century. In 17th-century Kent a number of families named Waghorn alias Wagon were occasionally also known as Waggoner (through false association with that word). Direct derivation from the English word wag(g)on is not possible, since it was borrowed into English only in the 16th century from Dutch, and wag(g)oner is an early Modern English coinage.

variants.name: Waghorn
meanings: English (Kent): name composed of Middle English waggen ‘to wag’ + horn ‘horn’. It is probably an occupational name for a ‘hornblower’ (a watchman, a town minstrel, or a huntsman), or perhaps a ribald nickname. Compare Waggoner .

variants.name: Wagner
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Wägner): occupational name for a carter and (in some dialects) a cartwright, from an agent derivative of Middle High German wagen ‘cart, wagon’, German Wagen. This surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Britain, Poland, and Denmark. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wágner and Vágner. In Russia, Czechia, Croatia, Slovenia, and Slovakia it is also found in the Slavicized form Vagner . Compare Wagener , Waggener , and Wagoner .

Dutch and perhaps also English: occupational name from Middle Dutch waghenaer ‘carter’ (compare 1 above). The Dutch word is not known to have been borrowed into English before 1600 but the surname Wagner is recorded in Norfolk (England) from 1379, perhaps a substitution of the Dutch word for Middle English wainer. Compare Waggoner .

nameMeanings.name: Conrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English spelling of Konrad, a Germanic personal name derived from kuon ‘bold’ + rad ‘counsel’. It was used occasionally in Britain in the Middle Ages in honour of a 10th-century bishop of Constance, but modern use in the English-speaking world is a reimportation from Germany dating mainly from the 19th century.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes 12th State
historicEvents.description: On November 21, 1789, North Carolina became the 12th state in the Union.

en.lifeSummary: When Conrad Waggoner was born on 20 January 1729, in Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Joseph Wagner, was 23 and his mother, Anna Maria Vogelgesang, was 21. He married Eva Margaretha Kale about 1752, in Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Bucks, Pennsylvania, United States in 1790 and Lincoln, North Carolina, United States in 1790. He died on 15 December 1799, in North Carolina, United States, at the age of 70, and was buried in Newton, Catawba, North Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conrad Waggoner est né le 20 janvier 1729, à Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Joseph Wagner, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Anna Maria Vogelgesang, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Eva Margaretha Kale environ 1752, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Bucks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1790 et à Lincoln, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis en 1790. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1799, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Newton, Catawba, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conrad Waggoner am 20. Januar 1729 in Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joseph Wagner 23 und seine Mutter Anna Maria Vogelgesang 21. Er hat um 1752 in Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Eva Margaretha Kale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1790 hat er in Bucks, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und 1790 in Lincoln, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1799 im Alter von 70 Jahren in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Newton, Catawba, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conrad Waggoner è nato il il 20 gennaio 1729 nel Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Joseph Wagner, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Anna Maria Vogelgesang, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Eva Margaretha Kale circa 1752, nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Bucks, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1790 e nel Lincoln, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1790. Morì il 15 dicembre 1799, nel Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Newton, Catawba, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Conrad Waggonerが1729年1月20日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンで生まれた時，父Joseph Wagnerは23歳，母Anna Maria Vogelgesangは21歳であった。約1752年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州でEva Margaretha Kaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1790年にはアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ブクスに，1790年にはアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州リンコルンに住んでいた。彼は1799年12月15日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州で70歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州カタウバニュートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Conrad Waggoner(이)가 1729년 1월 20일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joseph Wagner(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Maria Vogelgesang(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1752년 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 Eva Margaretha Kale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1790년도에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 벅스에서, 1790년도에 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 링코컨에서 살았다. 그는 1799년 12월 15일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 카타w바 뉴턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conrad Waggoner nasceu em 20 de janeiro de 1729, em Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Joseph Wagner, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Anna Maria Vogelgesang, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva Margaretha Kale aproximadamente 1752, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Bucks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1790 e em Lincoln, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América em 1790. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1799, em Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Newton, Catawba, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conrad Waggoner родился 20 января 1729 г. в местности звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Joseph Wagner было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Maria Vogelgesang, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Margaretha Kale около 1752 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности буккс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1790 году и в местности линколн, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в 1790 году. Он умер 15 декабря 1799 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности нютон, катавба, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conrad Waggoner nació el 20 de enero de 1729, en Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Joseph Wagner, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Anna Maria Vogelgesang, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Eva Margaretha Kale aproximadamente 1752, en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Bucks, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos en 1790 y en Lincoln, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos en 1790. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1799, en Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Newton, Catawba, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
